subject: chemistry
title: 17N.1.SL.TZ0.22
question_html:
Which of the following is a redox reaction?

A. 3Mg (s) + 2AlCl3 (aq) → 2Al (s) + 3MgCl2 (aq)

B. SiO2 (s) + 2NaOH (aq) → Na2SiO3 (aq) + H2O (l)

C. KCl (aq) + AgNO3 (aq) → AgCl (s) + KNO3 (aq)

D. 2NaHCO3 (aq) → Na2CO3 (aq) + CO2 (g) + H2O (l)
